items.title: Copilot Cowork General Availability
items.summary: Copilot Cowork reaches general availability with native and third-party connectors, partner plugins, and mobile, expanding delegated multi-step work across Microsoft 365.

details.heading: Copilot Cowork connectors and plugins
points: Bridge your knowledge sources with native and third-party connectors and plugins.
Microsoft native plugins and connectors such as Power BI and Fabric (Fabric IQ).
Partner integrations with Miro, monday.com, London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), and S&P Global Energy, with more on the way.
Add, create, and manage your own custom plugins and personal skills.
Example: a finance manager has Cowork review a contract, pulling Dynamics 365 Finance, LSEG, and S&P Global Energy data plus a custom Compliance Checker skill.
Partner plugins coming late May; Anthropic models currently excluded from the EU Data Boundary.

links.title: Anthropic models in Microsoft Online Services

details.heading: Copilot Cowork innovations
points: Since the March introduction, Cowork became available in Frontier.
Model choice: Anthropic and OpenAI models available within Cowork.
Available on iOS and Android mobile.
Integrated into Agent 365.
Create and manage your personal skills, plus custom, partner, and Microsoft native plug-ins.

links.title: Copilot Cowork: A new way of getting work done
Available today: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
(Co)work in Progress

items.title: Build 2026 Announcements
items.summary: Microsoft Build 2026 spotlights the Work IQ API GA, Microsoft Scout, Frontier Tuning, the Teams and Agent 365 SDKs, and expanded agent governance for developers.

details.heading: Microsoft Build 2026 overview
points: Annual developer conference, June 2-3, San Francisco and online.
Theme: Microsoft Build 2026 - Be yourself at work.
Headline blogs cover the new Work IQ APIs, Microsoft Scout, Frontier Tuning, and Learning Agent general availability.

details.heading: Work IQ API
points: Bring live, permission-trimmed work context into any agent via A2A, MCP, or REST.
Powered by four components: Chat, Context, Tools, and Workspaces.
Engineered for agentic workloads with faster responses, lower cost to build and run, and high-volume scale.
Governance by design: every response is permission-trimmed and operates on enterprise data in place.
Accessible via low-code (Copilot Studio) or pro-code (GitHub, Visual Studio) with consumption billing through the MAC.

details.heading: Cost management in the Microsoft 365 admin center
points: Manage Copilot credit spend and usage with a centralized dashboard across users and groups.
Control and configure spend with granular, cascading limits and overage policies at tenant, group, or user level.
Prevent cost overruns with monthly budgets, alerts, and forecasts.
Supports Work IQ API consumption billing; choose prepaid credits or pay-as-you-go.

details.heading: Microsoft Scout
points: First autopilot agent: a new class of autonomous, always-on agents that turn signals into action.
Built on OpenClaw, it proactively takes on work across email, calendar, meetings, chat, and docs.
Flags issues before you ask (calendar conflicts, stalled decisions), proposes fixes, and learns your priorities.
Operates with its own identity, storage, and mailbox, connected to Teams, Outlook, SharePoint, and OneDrive.
Build: cloud experience in Private Preview plus a local desktop app in Frontier (WW, English); requires GitHub Copilot license, admin opt-in, and Intune enablement.

details.heading: Frontier Tuning
points: Tunes any agent on customer data, processes, and conventions using the latest Microsoft AI frontier models.
Understands your IP, governed by your existing compliance and access controls.
A reinforcement learning environment used for both training and inference that never stops learning.
Produces tuned embedding and orchestration models plus skills and tools, fully tenant-resident.
Built via a step-by-step Agent Builder workflow so subject matter experts can build agents without data scientists.

details.heading: Microsoft Teams SDK
points: Unified toolset bringing chat messaging, Tabs, Microsoft Graph, and message extensions into one platform.
Removes boilerplate and complex conversational logic, reducing code by up to 90%.
Advanced orchestration with MCP and agent-to-agent (A2A) communication plus rich collaboration features.
Generally available in JavaScript, C#, and Python.

links.title: Welcome | Teams SDK

details.heading: Third-party agents for Microsoft Teams
points: @mention 3P agents like Linear in Teams to file bugs, assign work, and act without leaving the thread.
Update tasks and pull project status into Teams, connecting to your broader toolchain like GitHub Copilot.
Connect agents to channels to automatically share project updates.
Recent additions include Linear, Atlassian Rovo, and Cursor via Microsoft Marketplace.

links.title: Microsoft Marketplace: apps & agents for Teams

details.heading: Agent 365 SDK
points: Integrate any agent with Agent 365, where it automatically appears in the agent registry, ready for enterprise use.
Built-in secure Entra-backed Agent ID and standardized OpenTelemetry (OTEL) tracing out of the box.
Immediately subject to granular Agent 365 governance controls.
Manage Microsoft and custom MCP servers while supporting AI teammates or user-delegated agents.

links.title: Microsoft Agent 365 SDK and CLI

details.heading: Agent 365 extends coverage to local agents
points: Automatically discover 20+ AI agents running locally on managed endpoints, mapped to devices and users.
Runtime protection for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI (June 2), then OpenClaw and OpenAI Codex (~June 17).
Block unsanctioned agents and enforce endpoint policies with Intune.
Real-time visibility, detection, and blocking with Microsoft Defender; prevent data leaks with Purview.

headerLinks.title: Microsoft Build 2026: Be yourself at work
Announcing the new Work IQ APIs
Work IQ GA | Microsoft Licensing Resources
Work IQ: Production-ready intelligence for every agent
Introducing Microsoft Scout: Your always-on personal agent
Microsoft Scout documentation
Download Microsoft Scout (Frontier)
Frontier Tuning: Teaching AI to work the way you do
Learning Agent now generally available — personalized AI upskilling for every employee

items.title: Finance Agents (Gartner CFO Symposium)
items.summary: Agentic AI purpose-built for finance, with a Finance Agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot and a finance-savvy chat workspace grounded in Work IQ.

details.heading: Agentic AI transforms common finance activities
points: Quickly find and validate data across systems.
Use simple prompts to access financial insight, including annotations and supporting data.
Explore risks and outliers to drive clarity and bring in relevant stakeholders with a click.
Turn raw data and analysis into presentation-ready visualizations and whitepapers.
Expedite financial processes with intelligent automation.

details.heading: Finance Agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot
details.status: Included in the Microsoft 365 Copilot license
points: AI assistant purpose-built for finance to help in the flow of work, bringing trusted ERP data into your workflow.
Skills span financial risk assessments, reconciliation, data preparation, and variance analysis.
Targets 50-80% less time on manual finance tasks.
Detect risks early with real-time, cross-system insights.
Shift capacity to planning and decision-making.

details.heading: Home and Finance chat
points: Finance-savvy workspace within Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Ask finance questions in natural language from one centralized hub for chat, insight, and decisions.
Enterprise-grade security and governance based on role-level access.
Work IQ connects financial data to organizational intelligence so the agent understands how decisions get made.

items.title: Work Trend Index 2026
items.summary: The 2026 Work Trend Index explores how, as agents take on more execution, human agency expands across employees, leaders, and organizations.

details.heading: Agents, human agency, and the opportunity for every organization
points: 2026 Annual Report: Agents, human agency, and the opportunity for organizations.
Central question: as agents take on more execution, what does that unlock for employees, leaders, and organizations?
Finding: when AI and agents do more, human agency actually expands.
More research and insights available at aka.ms/worklab.

links.title: 2026 Work Trend Index: Agents & human agency
Microsoft WorkLab research & insights

items.title: Legal Agent for Word
items.summary: A purpose-built, first-party agent in Word for contract review, redlining, and clause analysis with a deterministic redlining engine.

details.heading: Legal Agent for Word
points: Analyzes contracts: understand agreements, compare versions, and cite risks directly to source language.
Drafts clean, negotiation-ready redlines with track changes.
Maintains history by separating prior revisions from new proposals.
Flags non-compliant clauses and recommends approved language from internal playbooks.
Secure by design as a first-party Microsoft agent within the Microsoft 365 trust boundary, using a purpose-built OOXML redlining engine.

items.title: Cowork and Researcher Updates
items.summary: Copilot Cowork arrives in Frontier and Researcher gains multi-model Critique and Council, pairing GPT and Claude for higher-quality deep research.

details.heading: Cowork and Researcher updates overview
points: March 30 announcement blogs: Copilot Cowork now available in Frontier.
Introducing multi-model intelligence in Researcher.

links.title: Copilot Cowork: Now available in Frontier
Introducing multi-model intelligence in Researcher

details.heading: Copilot Cowork now available to Frontier
points: Delegate real work, not prompts: Cowork plans tasks, reasons across tools and files, and keeps work moving over time.
Observable and controllable, with transparent actions and guardrails to guide or stop execution.
Grounded in Work IQ so it understands your work directly rather than stitching context from connectors.
Enterprise-ready within Microsoft security, identity, and governance.
Built in partnership with Anthropic; Anthropic models currently excluded from the EU Data Boundary.

links.title: Anthropic models in Microsoft Online Services

details.heading: Critique in Researcher
points: GPT drafts an initial response and Claude reviews it for accuracy, completeness, and citation integrity before delivery.
Measurably outperforms leading competitors on the DRACO deep-research benchmark.
Natively built in Microsoft 365 Copilot and leverages Work IQ work signals.
Adheres to privacy and permission settings; Anthropic models disabled by default for EU Data Boundary and UK customers.

links.title: Anthropic models in Microsoft Online Services

details.heading: Council in Researcher
points: Simultaneously run a prompt across multiple AI models right within Researcher.
Summarizes where models agree, disagree, and what each uniquely adds.
Designed for exploration, comparison, and pressure-testing decisions.
Natively built in Microsoft 365 Copilot with Work IQ; Anthropic models disabled by default for EU Data Boundary and UK customers.

links.title: Anthropic models in Microsoft Online Services

items.title: Frontier Moment with E7 and Copilot Wave 3
items.summary: The Frontier Suite debuts Microsoft 365 E7, deepens Work IQ, expands agentic Office and multi-model choice, and introduces Agent 365 as the control plane for agents.

details.heading: Introducing the Frontier Suite built on Intelligence + Trust
points: Secure agentic AI for Frontier Transformation, powering work with Copilot and agents.
Frontier firms combine intelligence that understands how work gets done with trust designed in from the start.
Spans Copilot Cowork, agentic Copilot in Excel/Word/PowerPoint, agentic Outlook, and apps in the flow of work.

details.heading: Microsoft 365 E7 - The Frontier Suite
points: Brings together Microsoft 365 Copilot, Microsoft Agent 365, and Work IQ on the Microsoft 365 E5 + Entra Suite foundation.
Productivity suite for a human-led, agent-operated enterprise that turns human intent into action.
Adds a unified governance layer for AI agents via Agent 365.
Available with or without Teams; general availability May 1, 2026.

details.heading: Work IQ: closing the context gap
points: Most AI works from snapshots, but work happens in context across files, chats, email, meetings, and people.
Work IQ is the intelligence layer with three parts: Data, Context, and Skills and Tools.
Builds a semantic graph and persistent memory of how you work over time.
Combines M365 signals with LOB data to give Copilot real-time understanding and predictive next steps.

links.title: A closer look at Work IQ

details.heading: Work IQ memory and personalization
points: Copilot uses custom instructions, saved memories, work profile, and chat history to tailor responses.
Soon it will also use M365 activity signals such as emails, meetings, and chats to determine relevance.
Users can view, manage, and control how memory and preferences are applied.

details.heading: Work IQ APIs
points: Extends Copilot's intelligence beyond first-party experiences to wherever work happens.
Exposes Copilot intelligence through a natural-language interface for developers building grounded agents.
Inherits Microsoft enterprise-grade identity, security, permissions, and compliance.

details.heading: Dataverse in Work IQ
points: Copilot Chat can access Dataverse data, incorporating structured info from Power Apps and Dynamics 365.
Grounds responses in the organization's full business context including customer, account, and operational data.
Copilot in Power Apps, Dynamics 365 Sales, and Customer Service can combine business data across the app ecosystem.
Public preview for Copilot Chat (June 2026) and Dynamics/Power Apps (April 2026), with model-driven Power Apps GA in May 2026.

details.heading: Work IQ Skills and Tools
points: Skills provide pre-defined, specialized instructions so Copilot and agents perform tasks accurately.
Tools execute against skill intent for trustworthy, repeatable outcomes over structured and unstructured data.
Toolset spans MCP server tools, Power Platform connectors, Power Automate and agent flows, API plugins, and connected agents.
Customers can add their own skills and tools that operate with Work IQ orchestration.

details.heading: Cowork
points: Brings long-running, multi-step work into Microsoft 365 Copilot, built in partnership with Anthropic.
Delegate real work, not prompts; Cowork plans tasks and reasons across tools and files.
Observable and controllable with transparent actions and guardrails.
Grounded in Work IQ and enterprise-ready within Microsoft security, identity, and governance.

links.title: Anthropic models in Microsoft Online Services

details.heading: Word, Excel, and PowerPoint Agents
points: Turn ideas into polished documents, spreadsheets, and presentations directly in chat.
Clarify requests through targeted questions about focus, theme, audience, and file length.
Draw from both web and work sources to research, analyze, and create high-quality content.
Refine results in chat or open in the Word, Excel, or PowerPoint apps to edit and collaborate.

details.heading: Scheduling and email composition from Chat
points: Schedule meetings end-to-end in Copilot Chat: find times, visualize fit, create agendas, reserve rooms, and send invites.
Move from draft to sent email in Copilot Chat without switching apps.
Scheduling from chat is generally available in English across M365 Copilot and Outlook endpoints.
Emailing from chat rollout to Frontier begins March 9 for M365 Copilot web and desktop.

details.heading: Multi-model choice and Claude in Copilot Chat
points: Choose the best model for each task without leaving Copilot; Chat now includes Anthropic Claude alongside OpenAI models.
Speed to value with the latest models, the right model for the job, and lower maintenance.
Claude excels at deep reasoning, long-form analysis, and structured writing.
Claude not available in EU/UK or US Gov and sovereign clouds; disabled by default in the EU Data Boundary.

details.heading: Latest GPT-5.3 Instant and GPT-5.4 Thinking models
points: GPT-5.3 Instant and GPT-5.4 Thinking available in Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio.
GPT-5.3 Instant improves refusal handling, search-grounded reasoning, and tone.
GPT-5.4 Thinking supports complex problems and strategic insights, connecting to Work IQ.
Accessible in the model selector across both Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio.

details.heading: Apps in Agents
points: Review information and take action across apps without leaving Chat.
Bring apps you already use like Outlook, Dynamics 365, Adobe, Figma, and Power Apps directly into Copilot Chat.
Real-time viewing, editing, and action turn Chat into a workspace.
Inherits Microsoft 365 Copilot security, privacy, and compliance controls.

details.heading: Building and improving agents in Copilot Studio
points: More proactive Describe and Configure panes guide makers through agent creation in real time.
Agent automation adds recurrent prompts and event-based triggers; submit agents for admin approval.
Richer knowledge sources including OneDrive files and Outlook skills.
Improved tool selection and SharePoint grounding raise agent answer quality.

details.heading: Managing agents and safeguarding prompts
points: Copilot Studio PII masking lets admins mask personal information in prompts and responses.
Agent Message Usage Estimator forecasts an agent's monthly message volume.
Microsoft Purview DLP prevents Copilot from responding, grounding, or web searching when prompts contain sensitive data.
DLP extends to Copilot Chat, Microsoft 365 Copilot, and Copilot Studio agents published to the Microsoft 365 channel.

details.heading: Microsoft Agent 365 - the control plane for agents
points: The control plane for agents, available May 1, enabling scaled adoption with oversight and guardrails.
Registry gives a complete view of all agents including agent ID, self-registered, and shadow agents.
Access control limits agents to needed resources with risk-based conditional access.
Visualization, interoperability via Work IQ, and security integrate with Entra, Purview, and Defender.
Roadmap spans Observe, Govern, and Secure with the Agent 365 SDK and Viva Insights dashboards.

headerLinks.title: Introducing the First Frontier Suite built on Intelligence + Trust
Secure agentic AI for your Frontier Transformation
Powering Frontier Transformation with Copilot and agents
Copilot Cowork: A new way of getting work done
From draft to done: agentic Copilot in Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
Copilot in Outlook: New agentic experiences for email and calendar
Enable agents to bring apps into the flow of work—while keeping IT in control

items.title: Chat GPT-5.4 Thinking
items.summary: GPT-5.4 Thinking arrives in Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio for complex problem solving and strategic insights, grounded in Work IQ.

details.heading: GPT-5.4 Thinking
points: Try the latest model directly in Copilot Chat.
GPT-5.4 Thinking supports complex problems and strategic insights, with advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows.
Connects to Work IQ to reason across meetings, emails, and documents for insights and strategic planning.
Accessible in the model selector in both Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio, available within 30 days of release.

links.title: Available today: GPT-5.4 Thinking in Microsoft 365 Copilot

items.title: Chat GPT-5.3 Instant
items.summary: GPT-5.3 Instant comes to Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio, improving refusal handling, search-grounded reasoning, and tone.

details.heading: GPT-5.3 Instant
points: Try the latest model directly in Copilot Chat.
Builds on GPT-5.2 Instant to improve refusal handling, search-grounded reasoning, and tone for more consistent results.
Connects to Work IQ to unlock insights, market research, and strategic planning.
Accessible in the model selector in both Copilot Chat and Copilot Studio.

links.title: Available today: GPT-5.3 Instant in Microsoft 365 Copilot

items.title: Chat GPT-5.2
items.summary: GPT-5.2 brings Thinking and Instant models to Copilot Chat, connected to Work IQ for insights, research, and strategic planning.

details.heading: Chat GPT-5.2 model
points: GPT-5.2 brings together two advanced models, available now.
GPT-5.2 Thinking is the best model yet for complex problems and strategic insights.
GPT-5.2 Instant is an efficient model for everyday writing, translation, and skill-building.
Connects to Work IQ for insights, market research, and strategic planning; available in Copilot Studio Early Release Environments.

items.title: Microsoft Ignite 2025
items.summary: Ignite delivers a sweeping Copilot wave: Work IQ, agentic Office and Outlook, new agents, Microsoft Agent 365, Windows 365 for Agents, and enterprise admin and security controls.

details.heading: AI built for work with Work IQ
points: Copilot is AI built for work, connected to the web and your work data and integrated in the flow of work.
Work IQ knows your work through Data, Memory, and Inference.
Memory adds implicit, conversational memory of your style, habits, and preferences.
Inference understands organizational relationships and enables predictive actions.

details.heading: New Copilot Chat value
points: Copilot Chat in Outlook will understand your entire inbox, calendar, and meetings.
Agent Mode in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint uses web data and referenced files to create and refine content.
Word, Excel, and PowerPoint Agents create high-quality documents, spreadsheets, and presentations in chat.
Available for Copilot Chat users with a Microsoft 365 license; rollout to Public Preview in Q1 2026.

details.heading: Agent Mode in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
points: Copilot orchestrates multi-step tasks to deliver Office documents, spreadsheets, and presentations.
Works with real Word styles, Excel formulas and tables, and PowerPoint layouts.
Grounded in your files, emails, and meetings via Work IQ plus web grounding; Excel offers OpenAI or Anthropic model choice.
Excel and Word to worldwide Q4 2025; PowerPoint to Frontier Nov 2025; Public Preview for Chat users Q1 CY26.

links.title: Standard versus priority access to features in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

details.heading: Word, Excel, and PowerPoint Agents
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: Turn ideas into polished documents, spreadsheets, and presentations directly in chat.
Each agent draws from web and Work IQ sources to research, analyze, and create.
Clarifies requests through targeted questions about focus, theme, audience, and length.
Refine in chat or open in the apps; Excel Agent currently uses web sources only.

details.heading: Copilot Chat in Microsoft 365 apps
points: Secure chat with web and Work IQ that reasons over open files with advanced app skills.
Built-in access to agents and advanced reasoning AI like Researcher and Analyst.
Includes in-app editing, work data prompts, and work data access across select Microsoft 365 apps.

details.heading: Microsoft 365 Copilot app navigation updates
points: Streamlined navigation pane to start chats, access agents, open recent notebooks, and explore Frontier experiences.
Expanded Chat history with infinite scroll and Chat search in the navigation pane.
New Library experience centralizes Copilot-generated images and Pages and content shared with you.
Rollout to Frontier Nov 2025, worldwide Dec 2025; Library from Oct 2025.

details.heading: Tools and Sources in the Copilot app
points: Get more relevant responses by selecting tools and specifying which data Copilot draws from.
Tools surface skills and agents including Designer, Researcher, and Analyst.
Sources specify whether Copilot taps web content, Microsoft 365 work content, or connected business data.
Available now.

details.heading: Video recap in Copilot Chat
points: Transforms recorded meeting summaries into narrated videos highlighting key takeaways.
Uses the meeting transcript to identify key topics and add voice-over.
Creates narrated highlights with short clips of important moments.
Available for recorded meetings in Copilot Chat, coming soon to the Recap page in Teams.

details.heading: Chat experience in Copilot Search
points: Brings powerful search and conversational chat into a single experience.
Ask, refine, and act in one streamlined conversational process.
Select documents from search results to guide chat responses and improve precision.
Public Preview Dec 2025; worldwide March 2026.

details.heading: Outlook mobile enhancements
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: Triage emails with voice: get summaries and ask questions about recent unread emails.
Take quick actions like flagging, pinning, archiving, deleting, and drafting replies.
Context-aware one-tap prompts based on what you are working on.
Available in Outlook iOS and Android; rollout to Frontier Nov 2025.

details.heading: Advanced scheduling and time management in Outlook
points: Triage meeting requests, negotiate conflicts, and schedule using natural language.
Copilot triages requests on your custom instructions and surfaces ones needing attention.
Mark 1:1s and personal events as flexible so Copilot can reschedule around conflicts.
Tell Copilot to schedule, update, or cancel meetings; it finds times, drafts agendas, and books rooms.

details.heading: Agent Mode in PowerPoint
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: Copilot edits, updates, and polishes your presentation in this early preview.
Rewrite slides, polish layouts, and format text while respecting your branded template.
Grounded in web and Work IQ sources to keep presentations accurate and current.
Edits are reviewable and preserve formatting, structure, and branding.

details.heading: Notebooks enhancements
details.status: Rollout start in Frontier program Oct-Nov 2025
points: Share Notebooks so teams can co-author and build on each other's work.
Overview Page shows summary content with proactive suggestions for references, topics, and prompts.
Generate narrated video overviews of Notebook content.
Rollout to Frontier program Oct-Nov 2025.

details.heading: Copilot Pages enhancements
points: Convert a Copilot Page into a polished PowerPoint with a single click.
Create Pages automatically through Chat and refine them side-by-side with Copilot.
Write, test, and run code in Pages, then deploy as an app in App Builder.
Rollout to general availability Nov 2025.

details.heading: Microsoft Edge for Business: the secure enterprise AI browser
details.status: Rollout start to Public Preview Feb 2026
points: Get insights across up to 30 open tabs and find sites you have closed using chat.
Access Copilot every new tab to chat, search the web, and get tailored work recommendations.
Complete multi-step workflows across websites with Agent Mode.
Rollout to Public Preview Feb 2026.

details.heading: New Microsoft 365 Copilot agents: Workforce Insights, People, Learning
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: Workforce Insights Agent helps leaders understand team composition, skills, and generate data-driven reports.
People Agent finds colleagues by skills and roles, surfaces recent context, and helps prep for meetings.
Learning Agent gives Copilot and AI tips, live role-play, and access to Viva Learning and LinkedIn Learning courses.
All rolling out to the Frontier Program Nov 2025.

details.heading: Sora 2 in Create
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: OpenAI's latest video model turns prompts into short video clips inside the Copilot app.
Replace media with a generated clip and adjust voiceover, music, and transcripts in the integrated editor.
Leverages Microsoft enterprise-grade permissions.
Rollout to Frontier Program Nov 2025.

details.heading: Agent usage report
points: Measure agent usage across Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat users.
View results segmented by publisher type: user-created, Microsoft-built, and partner-built.
Manage deployment with granular details on users, agents, and user-agent pairs in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
Available in Public Preview Nov 2025.

details.heading: Baseline security mode
points: Enforce Microsoft-recommended security settings across Office, Teams, Entra, and more in a few clicks.
Identify baseline gaps, simulate changes, and deploy protections with a guided experience.
Addresses up to 60% of Microsoft Security Response cases from the past two decades.
Opt-in and free for all commercial customers; rollout Nov 2025.

details.heading: Local processing for prompts and responses
points: Process Microsoft 365 Copilot interactions in-country to keep data local.
Helps regulated industries and governments meet legal and privacy requirements.
Available by end of 2025 in Australia, UK, Japan, India, and UAE.
Expands to 11 more countries throughout 2026; rollout Dec 2025.

details.heading: Microsoft Purview DLP to safeguard prompts
details.status: Rollout start to Public Preview Nov 2025
points: Prevents Copilot from responding, grounding, or web searching when a prompt contains sensitive data.
Extends to Copilot Chat, Microsoft 365 Copilot, and Copilot Studio agents published to the Microsoft 365 channel.
Reduces data leakage and oversharing risk in real time.
Rollout to Public Preview Nov 2025; requires a configured Purview DLP policy.

details.heading: Agent Dashboard and Copilot Chat reports
points: Agent Dashboard measures adoption and impact of custom, Microsoft, and third-party agents in Viva Insights.
Understand agent adoption trends and identify the most popular agents.
Copilot Chat reports analyze adoption in the Copilot Dashboard with usage, intensity, and retention.
Available for customers with 50+ Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses; Agent Dashboard preview Jan-Feb 2026.

details.heading: Admin agents for Teams and SharePoint
points: Teams Admin Center agents delegate tasks like meeting monitoring and remediate issues proactively.
SharePoint Admin Agent detects and remediates inactive, overshared, or ownerless sites and applies policies.
Agents accomplish tasks autonomously and securely while admins stay in control.
Rollout to Teams Admin Center and SharePoint Public Preview Nov 2025.

details.heading: Agents in Microsoft Teams Channels with MCP
points: Each channel has an AI teammate that turns intent into action and drives projects forward.
Channel Agent captures and tracks tasks and sends status reports.
MCP orchestration connects channel agents with apps like Asana, Atlassian, and GitHub.
Agents in Teams Channels in Public Preview since Sept 2025; MCP orchestration preview Nov 2025.

details.heading: SharePoint in Copilot: pages, lists, and metadata
points: Create SharePoint lists and pages from a Copilot conversation by @mentioning the SharePoint list or page agent.
Copilot reasons over the full richness of SharePoint, now including metadata understanding.
Understand document tags for more accurate, context-aware responses and auto-enrich documents with Knowledge Agent.
Metadata understanding GA for agents Oct 2025 and for Copilot Nov 2025.

details.heading: Sales Development Agent
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Preview, Dec 2025
points: Autonomous agent that acts like a teammate for lead research, qualification, outreach, and follow-ups.
Fully independent yet collaborative, working side-by-side with sellers.
Robust security, management controls, and observability with Agent 365.
Easy onboarding from the Agent Store; rollout to Frontier Preview Dec 2025.

details.heading: Improved agent creation and file generation in Copilot
points: Build and refine agents through natural conversation with real-time feedback.
Add work-related knowledge sources by describing them in plain language.
Agents can generate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files and save them to OneDrive.
Expanded knowledge sources include Teams meetings, calendar, directory, OneNote, and shared mailboxes, respecting permissions.

details.heading: Opal
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Nov 2025
points: New agent for orchestrating and executing task-based work on your behalf.
Operates with your identity using computer use on a secure Windows 365 virtual machine across browser-based apps.
Interact, pause, stop, and resume activity at any time with full auditability.
Use cases span HR time cards, engineering compliance and ADO updates, and procurement POs; rollout to Frontier Nov 2025.

details.heading: Copilot Tuning
points: Boost accuracy and relevance with agents fine-tuned to your business.
Automate model training with a turnkey, no-code experience in Copilot Studio.
Models stay within the Microsoft 365 service boundary, preserving ACLs and governance.
Limited Public Preview via the Early Access Program for customers with 5,000+ Copilot seats in NAM, EU, and APAC.

links.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning admin guide (early access preview)

details.heading: MCP connectors in Copilot
details.status: Rollout start to Public Preview Nov 2025
points: User-level MCP connectors securely link third-party tools like Notion, HubSpot, and Canva for real-time access.
Reasons over user-scoped data without syncing or duplicating, reducing data-leak risk.
Native MCP connectors in Copilot Studio cover core Microsoft 365 services with provided tools and actions.
Rollout to Public Preview in Researcher Nov 2025.

details.heading: Agent evaluation and runtime protection in Copilot Studio
points: Agent Evaluation tests agents with automated pre-launch evaluations to identify gaps before deployment.
Validate performance with detailed feedback showing where agents succeed or need work.
Additional Runtime Protection integrates Microsoft Defender, third-party, or custom security tools into agent runtime.
Detects and blocks prompt injection, jailbreaking, and malicious inputs in real time; Public Preview Oct 2025.

details.heading: Microsoft Agent 365 - the control plane for agents
points: Registry, access control, visualization, interoperability, and security for agents.
Bring agents under management and limit access with risk-based conditional access.
Connect agents to Work IQ and the same apps people use to simplify human-agent workflows.
Integrates with Microsoft 365, Power Apps, Power BI, Defender, Entra, and Purview; available in Frontier.

details.heading: Agent 365 SDK
points: Build enterprise agents with secure identity and complete observability.
Streamlined onboarding with Entra ID registration, channel setup, and access via the A365 Tooling Gateway.
Full telemetry with logging, metrics, and tracing routed to Purview, Sentinel, Defender, and App Insights.
Lifecycle hooks enable real-time monitoring, custom validation, and fine-grained governance; Public Preview Nov 2025.

details.heading: Windows 365 for Agents and AI-enabled Cloud PCs
points: Windows 365 for Agents lets builders design, test, and deploy computer-using agents on Cloud PCs.
Powers first-party agents like Opal and Researcher with orchestration, compliance, and scalability.
Windows 365 AI-enabled Cloud PCs bring enterprise AI to any device - Windows, iOS, Android, Linux, or web.
Native MCP support in Windows extends the agentic platform to the cloud; Frontier Preview.

links.title: Windows 365 AI Cloud PC interest form
Evolving Windows: new Copilot and AI experiences at Ignite 2025

details.heading: Agents in Intune and Copilot in Intune
points: Change Review Agent assesses change requests and recommends approval or denial.
Policy Configuration Agent captures intent and maps it to recommended settings.
Device Offboarding Agent recommends devices to offboard based on activity signals.
Copilot in Intune adds Autopilot, Endpoint Privilege Management, and Advanced Analytics; agents in public preview.

details.heading: Employee Self-Service agent
points: Single front door for HR and IT support working with Workday, ServiceNow, and SAP SuccessFactors.
Get answers and take action on tasks like checking leave balance and ordering equipment.
Set up with prebuilt, extensible workflows in Copilot Studio.
Rollout Oct 2025.

items.title: Copilot Voice
items.summary: Voice in Microsoft 365 Copilot brings natural, hands-free conversation to desktop and mobile, grounded in work and web data.

details.heading: Voice and vision capabilities
points: Work with AI through natural, hands-free conversation on mobile and desktop.
Brainstorm, catch up, or prepare for meetings with voice grounded in your work and web data.
Speak and interrupt easily on mobile or by pressing Win+C at your desk.
Get real-time help analyzing document content using voice; mobile first, with other Copilot experiences by end of year.

links.title: Introducing voice in Microsoft 365 Copilot: a more productive way to work on the go.

items.title: Researcher Agent with Computer Use
items.summary: Researcher gains computer use, performing tasks on a virtual computer to access, analyze, and automate research across public, gated, and authenticated web sources.

details.heading: Researcher with Computer Use
details.status: Rollout start to Frontier Program Oct 2025
points: Perform tasks using a virtual computer to access, analyze, and automate research on your behalf.
Unlock insights across public and gated web sources, overcoming paywalls and interactive browsing sites like travel booking.
Leverages advanced reasoning, interactive browsing, and automation powered by OpenAI's latest models.
Reasoning over internal data sources is not part of the initial public preview.

items.title: App Builder Agent & Workflow Agent
items.summary: New maker tools let anyone build apps, workflows, and agents in the flow of work directly inside Microsoft 365 Copilot.

details.heading: Apps, Flows, Agents
points: Become an AI maker building solutions in the flow of work.
App Builder builds apps for interactive workspaces.
Workflows Agent builds flows for automating repetitive tasks.
Copilot Studio builds agents for conversational assistance.

details.heading: App Builder
points: Build interactive, no-code apps in minutes to boost personal and team productivity.
Start from existing data and documents in Microsoft Graph.
Store app data in Microsoft Lists for instant deployment in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Share like a document with security and governance baked in; optionally start from runnable code in Copilot Pages.

details.heading: Workflows Agent
points: Create flows in Microsoft 365 just by using your words in chat.
Build, save, test, and run flows all within Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Quick scenarios like daily triage, weekly digests, and lightweight approvals.
Manage and edit active flows directly within Copilot.

details.heading: Agents in Copilot Studio
points: Build personalized, work-grounded agents using your words.
Connect to your Microsoft work graph - SharePoint, Teams, Outlook - and external systems.
Test, refine, publish, and share with your team, always honoring access permissions.
Runs on Microsoft 365 Copilot's secure, compliant foundation.

items.title: P3 Copilot Credits
items.summary: A new Pre-Purchase Plan (P3) joins capacity packs and pay-as-you-go as a third way to buy Copilot Credits, with tiered volume discounts and MACC eligibility.

details.heading: Three ways to buy Copilot Credits
points: Copilot Credits are the universal currency for agent usage across Copilot Studio, Dynamics 365 first-party agents, and Copilot Chat.
Capacity packs (MCS license): $200 per pack per month per tenant, 25,000 credits per pack.
Pay-as-you-go: $0.01 per message, transacted in the Azure Portal.
New Pre-Purchase Plan (P3) for larger or variable demand with built-in tiered volume discounts.
Capacity packs and P3 are MACC eligible; PAYG is not.

links.title: Scale your agent rollout with confidence: Introducing Copilot Credit Pre-Purchase Plan…

details.heading: Pre-Purchase Plan (P3)
points: Buy Copilot Credit as Copilot Credit Commit Units (CCCU) usable over one year.
Built-in tiered discounts up to 20% off PAYG rates.
Annual expiration of CCCU versus monthly capacity packs, with flexibility to add tiers anytime.
MACC eligible and tracked in real time in the Azure Portal; no Microsoft 365 admin center license needed.
1 CCCU = 100 Copilot Credits; unused CCCU expire at end of term.

details.heading: P3 tiers and discounts
points: Nine tiers from Tier 1 (3,000 CCCU / 300,000 credits, $2,850, 5% off) up to Tier 9 (3,000,000 CCCU / 300,000,000 credits, $2,400,000, 20% off).
Discount grows with commitment, unlocking more savings the more you commit.

items.title: Teams Mode for Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Teams Mode lets you collaborate with Copilot and colleagues together in Teams group chats.

details.heading: Teams Mode for Microsoft 365 Copilot
points: Collaborate with Copilot and colleagues in Teams group chats.
Start a 1:1 with Copilot and expand into a group chat, or add Copilot to an existing group chat.
@Copilot to ask questions, create content, retrieve files, and track decisions.
Review and approve responses when personal memory may be referenced; add users like any Teams chat.

links.title: Introducing Teams Mode for Microsoft 365 Copilot

items.title: Agent Mode and Office Agent
items.summary: Vibe working arrives with Agent Mode and a taste-driven Office Agent that generate and refine documents, spreadsheets, and presentations from natural language.

details.heading: Agent Mode and Office Agent
points: Generate and refine documents, spreadsheets, and presentations through natural language prompts.
Focus on intent while the AI handles the technical details.
Introduced as 'vibe working' in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Currently only available for consumers with personal accounts.

links.title: Vibe working: Introducing Agent Mode and Office Agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot

details.heading: Agent Mode in Word
points: Work with Copilot in a more interactive way where writing becomes a conversation.
Focus on your ideas while Copilot handles the details.
Uses Word's built-in styles and formatting.

links.title: Edit with Copilot in Word

details.heading: Office Agent
points: Multi-agent system built on an open-source stack, Anthropic's Claude model, and a taste-driven development paradigm.
Delivers polished PowerPoint presentations, ready-to-use Word documents, and soon Excel spreadsheets.
Orchestrates specialized agents that plan, draft, and refine Office artifacts end-to-end.
Currently only available for consumers with personal accounts.

links.title: Office Agent – "Taste driven" multi-agent system for Microsoft 365 Copilot
Get started editing with Copilot in Office

items.title: Microsoft Agent Store
items.summary: The new Microsoft Marketplace and in-product Agent Store provide a connected way to discover, deploy, and manage agents across Microsoft 365.

details.heading: Microsoft Marketplace and Agent Store
points: Microsoft Marketplace is a web storefront for all agents, AI apps, and tools.
Agent Store is the in-product experience for agents that work with Copilot.
One publishing process and one catalog from Microsoft Partner Center.
Research and transact on the web, then deploy and manage agents through the Agent Store.

details.heading: Agent Store
points: Features pre-built agents from Microsoft, trusted partners, and your organization.
Offers personalized discovery in the flow of your work.
Native to Microsoft 365 Copilot and available across Microsoft 365 apps.
Accessible to all users with no Copilot license required to visit; full catalog from the Marketplace.

details.heading: Trusted third-party agents
points: A wide ecosystem of partners from Adobe, SAP, and Atlassian to Miro and Monday.com.
Use agents to automate workflows, accelerate decision-making, and unlock new productivity.
More role- and industry-specific agents coming to the store in FY26.

items.title: Model Choice
items.summary: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4.1 join Microsoft 365 Copilot, giving users model choice across Researcher and Copilot Studio.

details.heading: Model Choice
points: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4.1 to Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Choose between OpenAI and Anthropic models for your tasks.
Available in the Researcher agent and Copilot Studio for more customizable AI workflows.

links.title: Expanding model choice in Microsoft 365 Copilot

details.heading: Researcher with Anthropic
points: Switch between OpenAI and Anthropic models in Researcher.
Organizations must opt in to enable external models.

links.title: Connect to xAI's models

details.heading: Copilot Studio with Anthropic
points: Choose an external model as the primary AI model in Copilot Studio.
Allow external large language models for generative responses in Power Platform.
Available in early release cycle environments worldwide, preview in all environments by mid-October, production by end of year.

links.title: Choose an external model as the primary AI model
Allow external language models for generative responses
Anthropic joins the multi-model lineup in Microsoft Copilot Studio | Microsoft Copilot…
Early release cycle environments

items.title: Human-Agent Collaboration
items.summary: New collaboration-focused agents embed across Teams, SharePoint, and Viva Engage to help groups coordinate, communicate, and execute.

details.heading: Human-agent collaboration
points: New collaboration-focused agents within Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Embedded in Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, and Viva Engage.
Help groups coordinate, communicate, and execute tasks more efficiently.
Make AI an active, protected participant in teamwork.

details.heading: Project Manager agent
points: Acts as a virtual project manager within your plans.
Streamlines the planning process so you focus on strategy.
Handles some tasks on your behalf.

links.title: Power up project management in Teams with the Project Manager Agent

details.heading: Facilitator agent
points: Works alongside you and your team in Teams meetings.
Takes real-time notes everyone can co-author.
Moderates meetings using the agenda, checking in midway and recapping decisions and open items.

details.heading: Teams Channel agent
points: Each channel gets a virtual expert.
Helps your team stay on top of tasks, summarize info, and streamline productivity.

links.title: AI and Microsoft Teams: A New Era of Collaboration

details.heading: Agents in Viva Engage communities
points: Each community can have its own AI-powered agent grounded in conversations and SharePoint content.
Answers questions, drafts responses, and cites sources.
Notifies admins or experts in Teams for review, with optional verification before posting.

links.title: Introducing agents in Viva Engage communities: Your AI-powered community expert

details.heading: Knowledge agent
points: Intelligent content curator that enriches and structures SharePoint content for AI.
A content management strategist that makes content more discoverable.
Auto-tags and classifies files with metadata to improve Copilot grounding.

links.title: Introducing Knowledge Agent in SharePoint

details.heading: Pre-built Microsoft agents
points: A growing catalog of pre-built agents designed for work.
Includes Skills, Channels, Survey, Communities, Facilitator, Analyst, Researcher, Interpreter, Project Manager, and Knowledge.
Availability spans Frontier, public preview, and general availability.

headerLinks.title: Announcing People Skills general availability and new Skills agent
Shipped! Surveys Agent now live for customers in Microsoft 365 Copilot (Frontier program)
Analyst agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Researcher agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Introducing new agents in Microsoft 365
Unleashing the power of agents in Microsoft Planner
AI agents - Microsoft Adoption

items.title: Copilot Chat in Microsoft 365 Apps
items.summary: Microsoft 365 users get secure Copilot Chat with web data inside the M365 apps, reasoning over open and uploaded files, with deeper work-grounded features for licensed users.

details.heading: Copilot Chat in Microsoft 365 apps
points: Microsoft 365 users can use Copilot Chat with web data directly in the apps.
Reason over open files, uploaded files, and files added using '/'.
Without a Copilot license, Copilot in Outlook reasons over individual emails, threads, or attachments only, not the full inbox.

details.heading: Licensing comparison
points: Copilot Chat (no license) and Microsoft 365 Copilot ($30 pupm) both get web data and a secure AI chat interface.
Both can reason over the open file, uploaded files, or files added with '/'.
Advanced create/edit/command features, agents for deeper support, and reasoning AI like Researcher and Analyst require a Copilot license.
Agent access is metered for unlicensed users.

details.heading: Use cases
points: Write an intro paragraph, visualize insights, create images, and draft recap emails are available to all.
Summarizing a full inbox, forecasting with Analyst, and building an industry report with Researcher require a Copilot license.

items.title: Copilot Studio Entitlements
items.summary: All Copilot Studio capabilities are now included with Microsoft 365 Copilot for agents running under a licensed user's identity, expanding employee-facing agent building.

details.heading: Copilot Studio entitlements expansion
points: All Copilot Studio capabilities, including agent flows, AI tools, and deep reasoning, are now included with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Applies to agents that run using a licensed user's identity.
Empowers users to build and use agents for employee-facing (B2E) productivity.
Message rates per 10 responses: Basic 1, Standard 15, Premium 100; agent flow actions 13 per 100, when using the authenticated user's identity.

links.title: Choose between Agent Builder in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Studio to build your…

details.heading: Copilot Chat vs Microsoft 365 Copilot capabilities
points: Detailed comparison of capabilities included versus metered across Chat, Search, Agents, Create, and Notebooks.
Copilot Chat (no license) gets GPT-5 web-grounded chat with work-data agents metered.
Microsoft 365 Copilot adds work-grounded chat, pre-built agents, Researcher and Analyst, role-based solutions, and the Copilot Control System.

links.title: Standard versus priority access to features in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

items.title: Role-based Agents
items.summary: Role-based AI solutions for sales, service, and finance professionals come to Microsoft 365 Copilot, embedded in Outlook, Teams, and Excel.

details.heading: Role-based AI solutions
points: Adds role-based AI solutions for sales, service, and finance professionals to Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Integrates AI into daily apps like Outlook and Microsoft Teams.
Streamlines tasks and improves customer engagement.
Rollout starts 10/10/2025.

links.title: Moving sales, service, and finance to the Frontier with Microsoft 365 Copilot

details.heading: Finance agents
points: Accelerate business impact and reduce cost with agents for finance processes.
Deliver new insight and reduce the time to compile and analyze data.
Drive efficiency by applying AI to manual, labor-intensive processes.

details.heading: Financial Reconciliation agent
points: Accelerate time-to-close with a Financial Reconciliation agent in Microsoft 365 Excel.
Intelligent data structure comparisons and guided troubleshooting.
Auto-generated report summary that highlights discrepancies.
Automate transaction matching with custom templates and scheduled triggers.

details.heading: Variance Analysis agent
points: Accelerate impact with a Variance Analysis agent in Microsoft 365 Excel.
Review anomalies, risks, and unmatched data with annotations and supporting data.
Follow up with suggested contacts and auto-summarized commentary.
Turn data into presentation-ready visuals for Outlook and Teams.

details.heading: Collections agent
points: Reduce costs with an agent for customer interactions in quote-to-cash.
Review customer financial standing directly within Outlook.
Share customer balance statements and invoice copies from Outlook.
Summarize and save customer interactions for accurate collaboration.

details.heading: Microsoft 365 Copilot for Sales
points: AI assistant that helps sellers catch up on pipeline, update CRM, prepare for meetings, and analyze calls.
Outlook email summaries enriched with CRM data and BANT (Budget, Authority, Needs, Timing) insights.
Draft customer replies using sales prompts; generate Word meeting-prep briefs blended with CRM data.
In Teams meetings, surfaces opportunity summaries and real-time brand/competitor SWOT detection.

details.heading: Copilot for Service
points: Brings generative AI into your existing contact center without rip-and-replace.
Embed Copilot in Outlook, Teams, and CRM desktops like Salesforce.
Generate case summaries, draft personalized emails, and browse and update CRM records.
Point-and-click setup over knowledge sources; $50 pupm bundle with Microsoft 365 Copilot, or $20 add-on.

items.title: GPT-5
items.summary: Copilot Chat is powered by GPT-5 with a real-time router that sends prompts to high-throughput or deeper-reasoning models, secured with enterprise data protection.

details.heading: Copilot Chat powered by GPT-5
points: Try the latest model from OpenAI in Copilot Chat.
A GPT-5 real-time router analyzes prompt complexity automatically.
Simple prompts route to the GPT-5 high-throughput model; complex prompts route to the GPT-5 deeper-reasoning model.
Reasoning models are in mainline Copilot Chat for the first time, with no manual model selection needed.
Both models are secured with enterprise data protection and optimized for work.

details.heading: Capacity-based access model
points: Microsoft moved to a capacity-based model for a more flexible, scalable experience.
Copilot Chat users without a Copilot license get standard access subject to service capacity for image generation, file upload, and GPT-5.
Microsoft 365 Copilot licensed users get priority access with faster, more consistent availability.
If capacity is unavailable, users are notified but tasks in progress continue uninterrupted.

links.title: Standard versus priority access to features in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

details.heading: GPT-5 Chat vs Reasoning vs Researcher
points: GPT-5 Chat: quick, straightforward Q&A, summaries, and brainstorming.
GPT-5 Reasoning: multi-step logical analysis for think-this-through prompts.
Researcher: recursive, exhaustive reasoning for deep cross-source synthesis and reports.
Copilot Chat with GPT-5 automatically chooses between Chat and Reasoning.
